StatusNote: The Spring 2004 archive includes recovered match reports from March and April, with team results and available St. Andrew's individual scores from 10 matches and tournament events.
HighlightNotes: Davy Clay tied for fifth individually at the SCISA Class AA State Tournament after shooting 90-70-160.
HistoricalSummary: St. Andrew's finished third at the SCISA Region 2-AA Final on Apr. 22, 2004 at Santee National Golf Club, shooting 325 behind Holly Hill's 307 and Beaufort Academy's 315.
Davy Clay led St. Andrew's with a 78, followed by Josh Smith at 80, Drew Aimone at 82, and Steve Carbone at 85. Samantha Long also shot an 86.

Clay and Smith made the All-region team. Beaufort Academy's Mark Anderson was the medalist with a 66, and the report noted that the first round of the state tournament would be played Apr. 26-27 at Fripp Island.

At the SCISA Class AA State Tournament at Ocean Point Golf Club on Fripp Island, St. Andrew's finished fourth in the 12-team field with a two-round 352-328-680. Davy Clay tied for fifth individually at 90-70-160, while Drew Aimone shot 80-83-163, Samantha Long shot 89-91-180, Steve Carbone shot 93-89-182, and Josh Smith shot 99-86-185.
